form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Last start second last in a small field at Devonport Synthetic Mdn-Sw on March 9 over 1350m, 26 len behind Rippington carrying 58.5kg at $101. At only start last preparation ran last of 8 at Longford on January 1 over 1400m, slow going 32 len behind Pacific Witness carrying 58.5kg at $61. Prefer in something easier.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Racing second-up today. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced ungenerously near 1200m and gave ground from the 400m.
Raced keenly in the early stages when being restrained to obtain cover.

form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. When well in the market at debut, led to the turn then faded second last of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 4 over 1220m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Woolclasser with 58.5kg at $3.90. Second-up made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1400m, 0.5 len behind Genuine Lady carrying 58.5kg at $8.50. Winning chance.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 5th of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1200m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Colleen's Crown with 58.5kg at $5.50. Previously second-up 3rd of 11 at Ballarat Synthetic Mdn-Sw on August 26 over 1500m, 4 len behind Call Me Phil with 59.5kg at $17. Strips fitter and expected to figure prominently.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping when Occasional Glimpse shifted out.
After 400m crowded for room and shifted out across heels.
Near the 300m shifted out and bumped with Flavius.
Raced wide without cover for the majority of the event.
Contacted on jumping by Let's Go Brandon.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently set the pace for much of the race 2nd in a small field at this track Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1400m, slow going nose behind Team Heist with 56.5kg at $3.20. The start before that 3rd in a small field at this track Mdn-Sw on March 13 over 1200m, slow going 1.5 len behind Windara Wolf with 54.5kg at $2.20. Overdue and sure to prove very tough to reel in.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped out at start. Laid out under pressure entering the home straight.
Had a tendency to hang in early stages and bumped with Vansittart.
Laid out under pressure over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months ran last of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Genuine Lady carrying 56.5kg at $7. Previously second-up from last on the turn 4th of 8 at this track Mdn-Sw on November 12 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Tassie Power carrying 56.5kg at $21. Fitter and much better than fresh-up run.

form.formComment: Mare by Needs Further facing the starter for the first time. Finished fourth in a Longford trial over 1400m on March 17. Well educated and off the inside is worth keeping safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Mare by Needs Further facing the starter for the first time. Finished fourth in a Longford trial over 1400m on March 17. Well educated and off the inside is worth keeping safe.

form.formComment: Jumped at long odds at debut, got back early 6th of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1200m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Colleen's Crown with 54.5kg at $41. Won't find this any easier so she must improve sharply.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At debut, ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 9 at this track 3yo Mdn on March 13 over 1200m, slow going 3 len behind Dizz Boogie Time with 55kg at $21. Last start got back early 3rd in a small field at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1400m, on a slow track; 1.0 len behind Dennyson carrying 55kg at $8.50. Has ability and is in the mix.
